label: Legolas extension with viscosity and Hall current is benchmarked against historic results

provenance.source_span: Under consideration for publication in J. Plasma Phys. 1 Legolas: magnetohydrodynamic spectroscopy arXiv:2206.07377v1 [physics.plasm-ph] 15 Jun 2022 with

strengths: Extends numerical tooling toward viscosity and Hall current effects.
weaknesses: Tool validation is not a substitute for a targeted Atlas-profile computation.
